title: Phostrogen Ericaceous Plant Food, 800g - Iron Rich Organic Ericaceous Plant Food - for Healthier Acid Loving Plants - Helps Prevent Leaf Yellowing - Plant Nutrition - Indoor and Garden Use
features: PLANT NUTRITION: For healthier, more beautiful acid-loving plants
SUITABLE FOR: Ideal for use on azaleas, camelliaa & rhododendrons, or any acid-loving and lime-hating plant
PREVENT YELLOWING: Rich in Iron for greener, healthier leaves, preventing leaf yellowing
EASY TO USE: Apply directly to the base of the plant, and hoe before watering
description: From the manufacturer ACID-LOVING, LIME-HATING A granular plant food that helps grow beautiful, healthy, acid-loving plants. Such plants include ornamentals like azaleas and camellias; fruits such as blueberries and shrubs such magnolia and many more. NATURAL BOOST FOR BLOOMS With extra Iron added, it produces richer, greener leaves whilst prevents leaf yellowing which can be common in such plants. Ingredients in Phostrogen Organic Ericaceous Plant Food are from natural sources, making it suitable for organic gardening. EXTRA HELP TO THRIVE Alongside Phostrogen Organic Ericaceous Plant Food, acid loving plants need to grow in soils that are also acidic or neutral to aid greater nutrient uptake. Before planting, use a pH scale to check levels in the soil, helping to determine the right area of your garden for growth.
